title: Midnight-Craving Italian Almonds Gnocchi
description: A floral and shattering Italian dish from Piedmont, featuring almond extract and plant-based-friendly ingredients, shaped like gnocchi. Its midnight-craving allure makes it perfect for a late-night treat.

ingredients.name: Almond extract
ingredients.notes: High-quality, unsweetened extract for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Almonds
ingredients.notes: Sliced or slivered almonds for garnish.

instructions: Combine the cassava flour, salt, and nutritional yeast in a medium bowl, whisking to incorporate.
Add the water, vegetable broth, and almond extract to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and let it rest for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a long rope.
Cut the rope into 1-inch pieces to form the gnocchi.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the grapeseed oil and balsamic vinegar to the skillet and whisk to combine.
Cook the gnocchi in the skillet for about 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown and crispy.
Serve the gnocchi hot, garnished with sliced almonds, chopped parsley, and a drizzle of balsamic glaze, if desired.
